configurationName.title: Configuration Name
configurationName.description: Name of the Agentforce Opportunity Configuration (e.g., "Default", "Sales_Team"). If blank, uses "Default".

fieldValuesJson.title: Field Values (JSON)
fieldValuesJson.description: JSON string containing field API names and values. Example: {"Name":"Test Opportunity","StageName":"Prospecting","CloseDate":"2026-12-31"}
